sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁנער

Transliteration: shin‛âr

Phonetic: shin-awr'

BDB Definition:

Shinar = "country of two rivers"
  1. the ancient name for the territory later known as Babylonia or Chaldea

Origin: probably of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: 2424

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
